steps.title: Read the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence says the poem may seem like barren terrain for criticism. The next sentence says Whitaker finds fertile ground in it and writes extensively about the first two stanzas. The transition must mark a contrast.

steps.title: Choose the opposing transition
steps.content: A signals similarity, C signals sequence or result, and D signals restatement. None fits the turn from seeming unpromising to proving productive for analysis. The transition needs to mean despite that earlier impression. The answer is B.
